sources.claim: AI Advanced PC penetration projected to climb 52% YoY to ~59% of global shipments in 2026, up from ~39% in 2025
Global on-device AI market estimated at $33.21B in 2026, growing at 24.8% CAGR to $156.59B by 2033
Global AI processor market at $73.01B in 2026, growing at 26.11% CAGR to $467.09B by 2034; market was ~$6.4B in 2020
CES 2026: NPUs are now a requirement across all flagship PCs; Intel 18A breakthrough + AMD Ryzen AI Ultra launch mark pivotal transition
Gartner forecasts 100% of commercial PC purchases will be AI PCs by end of 2026; 40% of software vendors to prioritize AI PC capabilities by 2026 vs. 2% in 2024
EU AI Act compliance deadline August 2, 2026 creates dual obligations for high-risk AI systems; GDPR fines have passed €7.1B cumulative
AI PC market share grew from 9% in 2022 to 31% in 2025 and projected 54.7% in 2026; multiple SLMs run locally vs. zero in 2023
45% of workers now regularly use AI at work; AI adoption jumped 13% — but confidence in using the tech fell 18% (WEF Jan 2026)
Microsoft Copilot+ PC standard launched May 2024 requiring 40+ TOPS NPU; Qualcomm Snapdragon X Elite leads initial Copilot+ partner lineup
Samsung confirmed Android XR smart glasses and AI PCs launching H2 2026; Galaxy Glasses priced $600–$900, powered by Gemini AI + Android XR
